summary: Iteration 6 - Step 7 (Workout In Progress) and Step 8 (Workout Complete) testing SUCCESSFUL. All 19 new features tested and working correctly. Step 7 shows workout title, exercise progress (X of 5), exercise details (icon, name, sets, reps, instruction), PREV/PAUSE/NEXT controls, progress bar, and progress dots. NEXT cycles through 5 exercises. FINISH button appears on last exercise and navigates to Step 8. Step 8 shows success message, +10 Iron Miles earned, workout stats, and BACK TO DASHBOARD button. Full loop works: Generate → Ready → In Progress → Complete → Dashboard. Regression test passed: Steps 1-6 still work correctly. 100% success rate.

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecation warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'
react_native_issues.impact: No functional impact - just console warnings. Same as previous iterations.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'Animated: useNativeDriver is not supported because the native animated module is missing. Falling back to JS-based animation.'
react_native_issues.impact: Expected in web preview. Animation falls back to JS-based and works correctly. No user-facing impact.

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Step 7 (Workout In Progress) implementation EXCELLENT - all features working
✅ Step 8 (Workout Complete) implementation EXCELLENT - all features working
✅ Navigation flow updated correctly: Step 6 START WORKOUT now goes to Step 7 (not dashboard)
✅ Exercise cycling works perfectly: NEXT advances through 5 exercises, PREV goes back
✅ PREV button correctly disabled on first exercise (exerciseIndex === 0)
✅ NEXT button correctly shows 'FINISH' on last exercise (isLast check)
✅ Progress bar fills proportionally: 20%, 40%, 60%, 80%, 100% for exercises 1-5
✅ Progress dots update correctly showing current position (ipDot, ipDotActive, ipDotDone styles)
✅ Exercise data displays correctly: icon, name, sets, reps, instruction text
✅ Top bar hidden during Step 7 for focused workout experience (line 731: step !== 7)
✅ Step 8 shows all required elements: success icon, title, +10 miles, stats, CTA
✅ BACK TO DASHBOARD correctly returns to home (router.back() on line 777)
✅ Full loop architecture working: Generate → Ready → In Progress → Complete → Dashboard
✅ State management excellent: exerciseIndex state tracks current exercise
✅ All testID attributes present for testing (ip-prev-btn, ip-pause-btn, ip-next-btn, back-to-dashboard-btn)
✅ React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView)
✅ All styles use StyleSheet.create() - no CSS files
✅ All text properly wrapped in Text components
✅ Color palette consistent with Iron Miles branding (dark/gold/green theme)
✅ Touch targets adequate for mobile (all buttons well above 44px minimum)
✅ Expo Router navigation working correctly (router.back())
✅ Regression test passed: Steps 1-6 still work correctly after adding Steps 7-8

success_rate.backend: N/A - No backend for this UI-only flow
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 19 new features working correctly. Steps 7-8 implemented successfully.

seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - hardcoded SAMPLE_WORKOUT constant in generate-workout.tsx
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 confirms Steps 7 (Workout In Progress) and 8 (Workout Complete) are working perfectly. Full 8-step flow now complete: Steps 1-4 (questions), Step 5 (loading), Step 6 (result), Step 7 (in progress), Step 8 (complete). All navigation working correctly. Full loop tested: Generate → Ready → In Progress → Complete → Dashboard. No issues found. Flow is production-ready.

✅ Clicking NEXT advances to Exercise 2 of 5 with updated content

✅ Clicking PREV goes back to previous exercise (Exercise 2 → Exercise 1)

✅ Progress bar fills proportionally (20%, 40%, 60%, 80%, 100%)
✅ Cycling through all 5 exercises works correctly
✅ On last exercise (5 of 5), NEXT button shows 'FINISH'
✅ Last exercise shows 'Steering Wheel Holds' with correct details

✅ Workout Complete shows 'WORKOUT COMPLETE' title
✅ Workout Complete shows '+10' Iron Miles earned

✅ BACK TO DASHBOARD button visible and tappable
✅ BACK TO DASHBOARD returns to the dashboard
✅ Full loop works: Generate → Ready → In Progress → Complete → Dashboard
✅ Dashboard still functions correctly after completing the loop
✅ Previous Generate Workout flow (steps 1-6) still works correctly (regression test passed)
